# leadingTextProvider

**Instance Property**

The text to display on the leading edge of the gauge.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var leadingTextProvider: CLKTextProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

This property supports multicolor text.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **centerTextProvider**: The text to display in the center of the gauge.
- **gaugeProvider**: The gauge to display in the complication.
- **trailingTextProvider**: The text to display on the trailing edge of the gauge.
